person.name: Otho Dominus de Stanwell Gerardo Geraldine

nameForms.fullText: Otho Dominus de Stanwell Gerardo Geraldine

memoryArtifacts.headline: The Garretts -- Before America
memoryArtifacts.description:
The Garretts — Before America
by John E. Garrett
Last year, I published my work entitled, "1000 Years of Garrett Family History". The emphasis in that effort
was the genealogy of the Garretts since their immigration to America in the mid-seventeenth century. This
work examines how the Garretts evolved during the generations that they spent in England, Wales and
Ireland from the time the first ancestor landed in England until the first Garrett came to America.
My research involved the use of:
 A commercial genealogy website named Ancestry.com.
 Extensive use of the Google search engine on the Internet
The first 100 years, starting in the eleventh century, was the most interesting. That was where I found a
remarkable relationship between my ancestors and King Edward the Confessor, King William the Conqueror
and King Henry I. My first ancestor to land in England, Otho Geraldini, grew-up with Edward before he
became King; his son Walter FitzOtho was in William, the Bastard's army; and his son Gerald grew-up with
Prince Henry (King William"s son) who became King Henry I. Their close relationship is demonstrated by the
vast amount of land, castles and titles bestowed upon them.
In retrospect, I am impressed at how important the genes of the spouses are to the family's genealogy. The
best example of this is when my ancestor, Gerald of Windsor married Nesta Rhys, a Welsh Princess. There
offsprings were all outstanding. The next "high" came when the Garrett's became merchants in the 16th
century, opened trade with Russia, became Lord Mayor of London and honorary knighthood.
To make this work more readable, I have placed several interesting "asides" in the Appendix. For example,
the de Clares, of Richard "Strongbow" de Clare fame married into the Garretts. I found extensive genealogy
on the ancestry of Richard "Strongbow" de Clare going back before 100 AD. So, I put his data into two
appendices. One for the French ancestors and another for the Viking ancestors.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Otho Dominus de Stanwell Gerardo Geraldine於1006年10月5日出生在義大利托斯卡納費倫時，他的父親Lord Otterus Gherardo Gherardini17歲，母親Sancia de la Cerda17歲。他和Gherardini至少有1個兒子。他於1042年住在義大利。他去世於大約1058年在英國英格蘭素瑞斯坦維爾享年53歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stanwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Gerardo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Francisco, Alberto, Alfredo, Aurelio, Carlos, Jesus, Juan, Norberto, Ramon, Tomas, Ana.  Italian Antonio, Carmine, Dino, Enrico, Marco, Marco Antonio.
Spanish and Italian: from the personal name Gerardo (see Gerard ).

variants.name: Gerard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Camille, Jean-Pierre, Murielle, Emile, Pascal, Pierre, Agathe, Alain, Aldes, Antoine, Armand.

French (Gérard), Walloon (mainly Gérard), and English (of Norman origin): from the personal name Gérard, Gerard (from Old French Gerart, Girart), composed of the ancient Germanic elements gēr ‘spear, lance’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. As a surname of French origin it is also found in Haiti. Compare Garrard and also French Guerard , English Garard , Gerrard , and Jarrard .

nameMeanings.name: Otho
meanings: Some translate Otho 'happy' and Otto 'rich;' but they would seem to be the same name, for Otho of Freysingen, son of Leopold, Margrave of Austria, and of Agnes, daughter of the Emperor Henry IV., is also called Otto. It was the surname of a Roman emperor, and of one of the Roscian family; It comes from Old German od, excelling, happy, fortunate.

en.lifeSummary: When Otho Dominus de Stanwell Gerardo Geraldine was born on 5 October 1006, in Florence, Tuscany, Italy, his father, Lord Otterus Gherardo Gherardini, was 17 and his mother, Sancia de la Cerda, was 17. He had at least 1 son with Gherardini. He lived in Italy in 1042. He died about 1058, in Stanwell, Surrey, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Otho Dominus de Stanwell Gerardo Geraldine est né le 5 octobre 1006, à Firenze, Toscana, Italie, son père, Lord Otterus Gherardo Gherardini, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Sancia de la Cerda, avait 17 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Gherardini. Il a vécu à Italie en 1042. Il est décédé environ 1058, à Stanwell, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Otho Dominus de Stanwell Gerardo Geraldine am 5. Oktober 1006 in Firenze, Toscana, Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Otterus Gherardo Gherardini 17 und seine Mutter Sancia de la Cerda 17. Er hatte mit Gherardini mindestens 1 Sohn. 1042 hat er in Italien gelebt. Er starb um 1058 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Stanwell, Surrey, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Otho Dominus de Stanwell Gerardo Geraldine è nato il il 5 ottobre 1006 nel Firenze, Toscana, Italia, il suo padre, Lord Otterus Gherardo Gherardini, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Sancia de la Cerda, aveva 17 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Gherardini. Vissuto a Italia nel 1042. Morì circa 1058, nel Stanwell, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Otho Dominus de Stanwell Gerardo Geraldineが1006年10月5日にイタリアトスカナフィアーエンズで生まれた時，父Lord Otterus Gherardo Gherardiniは17歳，母Sancia de la Cerdaは17歳であった。彼はGherardiniとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1042年にはイタリアに住んでいた。彼は約1058年にイギリスイギリススリースタンウエルで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Otho Dominus de Stanwell Gerardo Geraldine(이)가 1006년 10월 5일 이탈리아 토스캔아 피렌즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Otterus Gherardo Gherardini(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Sancia de la Cerda(은)는 17세였다. 그는 Gherardini(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 1042년도에 이탈리아에서 살았다. 그는 대략 1058년 영국 잉글랜드 수리 스탠웰에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Stanwell, Surrey, England: Stanwell, Sūþrīge, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Otho Dominus de Stanwell Gerardo Geraldine nasceu em 5 de outubro de 1006, em Firenze, Toscana, Itália, seu pai, Lord Otterus Gherardo Gherardini, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Sancia de la Cerda, tinha 17 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Gherardini. Ele viveu em Itália em 1042. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1058, em Stanwell, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Otho Dominus de Stanwell Gerardo Geraldine родился 5 октября 1006 г. в местности фиренз, тоскана, Италия, его отцу по имени Lord Otterus Gherardo Gherardini было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Sancia de la Cerda, 17. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Gherardini. Он жил в местности Италия в 1042 году. Он умер около 1058 г. в местности станвелл, сурри, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Otho Dominus de Stanwell Gerardo Geraldine nació el 5 de octubre de 1006, en Firenze, Toscana, Italia, su papá, Lord Otterus Gherardo Gherardini, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Sancia de la Cerda, tenía 17 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Gherardini. Vivió en Italia en 1042. Murió aproximadamente 1058, en Stanwell, Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 53 años.
